name: Mariya Shidou
description: __Height:__ 160.3 cm At first glance, a seemingly kind, and selfless student, Mariya's true personality couldn't be further from that. A cunning, and incredibly sadistic boy who enjoys nothing more than torturing Kanako, or his twin sister Shizu, although he claims the treatment of the latter is because of his love for her. name: Pokkle
description: __Nen Type:__ Emission In the same Hunter exam as Gon, Pokkle ends up passing. He pursues his dream of becoming a Wildlife Hunter, discovering new types of animals and plants. In the Hunter exam Pokkle uses a bow and arrows tipped with a paralyzing poison. After discovering nen, he creates a hatsu called Rainbow;. It can shoot 7 different arrows, every color of the rainbow. Every color has a different attribute. Only his red and orange arrow have been seen: flame element and the highest speed, r

name: Ryuunosuke Tsunashi
description: __Height:__ 190 cm Ryunosuke Tsunashi is actually a very shy and timid soul, who has a difficult time talking with women due to growing up with his brothers. There’s also a good argument for Ryuu’s naivete, if his comments to the woman at his father’s hotel are any indication. He’s very kind and understanding to those younger than him, acting like an older brother to just about everyone.

name: Sandman
description: Sandman is a participant in the Steel Ball Run race from a Native American tribe. Despite being ostracized, he hopes that winning the race will earn him the money to buy back his ancestor's land, and he quickly becomes one of the fiercest competitors in the race thanks to his running technique. ~!Sandman is a Stand User who wields In a Silent Way in battle, which can store sounds in objects or even people.!~

name: Takeru Takaishi
description: Takeru Takaishi is a character in the anime and manga series Digimon Adventure, Digimon Adventure 02 and Digimon Adventure tri.. He is a DigiDestined, partnered with Patamon, and embodies the trait of Hope. He is the younger brother of Yamato Ishida. Takeru is a very cheerful and amiable person. He doesn't like when others are fighting or sad, and will do anything in his power to make others happy. name: Utau Hoshina
description: __Height:__ 161cm Utau is a 14-year-old junior high/high school student model turned into singing idol.

name: Yume Nijino
description: Yume is known to be cheerful and full of curiosity, but cries easily when touched. She is also a person with a strong will to never give up. Yume highly adores the unit group S4, and was said to be an owner of hidden talent. (Source: Aikatsu Stars! Wikia)

name: Adonis Otogari
description: __Unit:__ UNDEAD __Club:__ Track & Field Club __Circles:__ Sports Survivors, Kaori A young half-Japanese man who came from the Middle East. He finds violence unpleasant and, with a tender heart, has a strong desire to protect the weak. With a kind voice that seems to embrace you, his performances are as gentle as they are powerful. name: Fuyumi Todoroki
description: The only daughter of Eiji and Rei. Fuyumi is the younger sister of Touya and the older sister of Natsuo and Shouto. Fuyumi is a hard working girl, often making meals for the family and works as a teacher at an unnamed school. Unlike her family members, she doesn't resent her father and just wishes they could all be a happy family, though she realizes such a thing is unlikely. Pandora also has some ties with the Witch Cult. ~! Pandora's main ability is "Authority of Vainglory". With this authority, Pandora is able to rewrite phenomenon to her liking as much she desires. name: Reo Niiboshi
description: A policeman who works at a policebox, and Mabu's partner. ~!He and Mabu are the one responsible for murdering suspected criminals and extracting their desire, creating Kappa Zombies in the process. He worked for the Otter Empire!~ ~!He is later killed by Toi Kuji, and brought back to life when Keppi fused with the dark kappa.!~

name: Seiji Maki
description: Maki is a first-year high school boy and a member of the student council. He grew up surrounded by two older sisters and a younger sister, so he finds it easy to talk with girls.

name: Sousaku Yubiwa
description: Year 1, class A at Yubiwa Academy Middle School. He is the heir and de facto president of the Yubiwa Foundation, the parent organization of the Yubiwa Academy. As a child prodigy with both financial and artistic talents, he is a member of the Detective Club's art team. He is expressionless and of few words, but only Manabu can read his thoughts. Usually only speaks twice in each book.

name: Tanukichi Okuma

name: Tao
description: Tao is a young man who possesses a genius-level intellect in computer programming and other technological fields. He was one of the less cold-hearted members of the DA-5 group, made by Dr. Iris, and is yet another a modified human. He is currently residing with Takeo and M-21 in Frankenstein's residence and is also working as a security guard in Ye Ran High School. He is "Number One" of the RK-4 which is a group of four formed by himself.

name: Aki Nijou
description: The school nurse. She is also the staff-advisor (sort of a "teacher overseer") of Maken-Ki. She was in the Maken-Ki of the school before it became an all-girl's school. She has absurdly huge breasts, possibly the largest of the cast, which attracts the attention of all male students and the envy of girls around her.

name: August Stilza
nativeName: オーガスト・スティルザ
description: __Affiliation:__ Cleaners __Height:__ 187 cm August Stilza is a member of the Cleaners, and serves as the artisan for them, crafting their masks and clothes. He is a very loud and passionate man, but is known to actively procrastinate finishing his work when given a deadline or rushed, and when left to complete in his own time will pump out high quality work in no time.
searchTerms: オーガスト・スティルザ
